product.name: ArWoWear T2 Soft
descriptions: ArWoWear T2 Soft is light weight 245 g/m², 100% cotton workwear twill fabric.
It is the economical version of ArWoWear T2 series.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Water and Oil Repellent | 4 | EN ISO 4920

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Coveralls/workwear could be used by uniformed services but no explicit military/police reference is provided.

stage1.noMatchReason: Product is a generic economical 100% cotton twill workwear fabric intended for coveralls, with no explicit statement linking it to military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hi-vis, medical, sport, architecture-building or transport applications.

primary.rationale: This is a generic economical cotton twill workwear fabric explicitly intended for coveralls, with no narrower named sector (military, firefighting, energy, welding, etc.) stated, making general workwear/industrial apparel the most defensible primary application.

secondary.rationale: No independent evidence supports a second distinct application; the product is a straightforward general workwear fabric.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: No explicit military, police or uniformed-service reference; stage1 advisory noted this as unconfirmed.

normalized.primaryRationale: This is a generic economical cotton twill workwear fabric explicitly intended for coveralls, with no narrower named sector (military, firefighting, energy, welding, etc.) stated, making general workwear/industrial apparel the most defensible primary application.
